name: Las Vegas Pawn
description_short: Las Vegas Pawn operates two locations in San Bernardino and Victorville, California, offering instant cash loans secured by collateral and buying/selling used merchandise.
description_long:
Las Vegas Pawn is a pawn shop operator with nearly 20 years of experience in the collateral lending and merchandise resale business. The company maintains two physical locations—one in San Bernardino and one in Victorville, California—serving customers seeking quick access to cash through item pawning or sales.

The company's primary services include pawn loans (ranging typically from $10 to $200, with larger loans available for high-value items), buying precious metals and jewelry for cash, purchasing electronics, and reselling used merchandise at below-retail prices. All items are appraised on-site, and customers receive immediate cash payments. Las Vegas Pawn specifically markets expertise in gold, diamonds, silver, televisions, tools, and jewelry valuation.

Las Vegas Pawn distinguishes itself through claims of fair market pricing, professional appraisal staff, accurate precious metals valuation methods, and extended operating hours (8:30 AM to 10 PM on weekdays and Saturdays, 8:30 AM to 10 PM on Sundays). The company emphasizes speed, courtesy, discretion, and confidentiality in its transactions. They advertise having "the lowest prices around" on resale items and promise to "pay the most" for customer valuables.

As a pawn shop, Las Vegas Pawn serves consumers needing immediate cash but should be understood as a collateral-based lending alternative rather than a traditional credit solution. Customers must have physical items of resalable value, and pawn loans require surrendering possessions for the loan duration. While faster than traditional loans, this model carries the risk of item loss if loans aren't repaid.
pros: Same-day cash payout with no loan application or approval process required
Extended hours until 10 PM on weekdays and weekends, including night window service
On-site appraisal with immediate cash payment; no waiting period
Nearly 20 years of operating experience and stated expertise in precious metals and jewelry valuation
Two convenient locations in San Bernardino and Victorville
Loan amounts flexible from $10 up to thousands of dollars based on item value
Advertises competitive pricing for both pawn loans and resale merchandise purchases
cons: You must surrender physical possessions as collateral; failure to repay results in permanent loss of items
Interest rates and loan terms not disclosed on website, making true cost comparison impossible
Limited loan amounts typically $10–$200, requiring high-value items for larger cash needs
Only serves San Bernardino and Victorville areas; no online service or shipping of items
Pawn model is inherently expensive for long-term borrowing compared to traditional personal loans
best_for: Consumers with jewelry, electronics, or precious metals who need immediate cash within hours
People in emergency situations requiring $50–$500 cash who cannot access traditional credit
Bargain shoppers seeking used electronics, tools, and merchandise at discounted prices
Individuals seeking to liquidate gold, diamonds, or silver for quick cash payment
diagnosis: Las Vegas Pawn is best for consumers with valuable physical items who need immediate cash ($50–$500 typically) and cannot access traditional credit within hours. The critical caveat is that pawning is a collateral-based lending model where failure to repay means permanent loss of the item—making it significantly more expensive than traditional loans for extended borrowing, and it should only be used for genuine emergencies.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry, diamonds, and precious metals
Pawn loans on electronics and televisions
Pawn loans on tools and other tangible items
Gold buying and cash payment for precious metals
Resale of used merchandise at below-retail prices
Night window service for after-hours access
